title: Only output image id if running buildah bud --quiet
body:
We should be outputing just the imageID when doing a buildah bud quiet.
Currently the stdout from containers is showing up on the screen.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@nalind @vrothberg @giuseppe @mheon @QiWang19 PTAL
Lets get this merged and then we can cut another Buildah release to get it into Podman.
